prompt:
A small engraved PLA nameplate insert resting on a workbench beside the matching trophy core, sized to fit flush into a recessed slot. The plate has shallow engraved grooves and crisp edges, but any characters are abstracted or too soft to read, making the object clearly “a custom nameplate” without visible text.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image in a grounded near-future solarpunk maker setting: soft cinematic lighting, clean materials, no logos, and no readable text. Keep the nameplate large in frame with the trophy recess slightly blurred behind it for context and icon clarity.
